pattern: The deposits form complete weeks of a fixed arithmetic pattern (1..7 shifted up by the week number) plus one partial trailing week, so the total is a closed-form sum over whole weeks plus a short leftover loop.
hints: Split the n days into full 7-day weeks and a remainder of leftover days.
In week w (starting from 0), the seven daily deposits are w+1, w+2, ..., w+7, so a whole week's total is 7*(w+1) + 21.
Sum the full weeks with that formula, then add the leftover days using the same starting value as the next week would have had.

edge_inputs.description: one full week plus one extra day

stress.description: every value across the legal range
stress.note: tiny bounded domain, purely to cross-check the closed form against day-by-day simulation
